public_on_target_scout_clean.best_trial_note: This study completed before the tighter balanced-v2 search-space patch, so some sampled values fall outside the new constrained ranges.

promoted_full_run_balanced_v2_t0_rorqual.note: This replaces the local promoted full run, which was stopped to prioritize cluster execution.

public_on_target_optuna_rorqual.note: 8-trial cluster scout expansion using the synchronized public on-target benchmark bundle.

method_map_generated.new_local_evidence: The unresolved blank guide set contains all 10 guides from the legacy UQAM CIRCLE-seq bundle plus one extra guide (GTCATCTTAGTCATTACCTGNGG). This is strong evidence of a CIRCLE-derived bucket, but not yet sufficient to relabel as claim-valid CIRCLE without explicit source confirmation.

cclmoff_circle_cv.reason: No resolved CIRCLE-seq rows exist in the staged CSV after excluding unresolved blank Method rows.

cclmoff_circle_to_guide.reason: Requires resolved CIRCLE-seq rows plus GUIDE-seq rows.

cclmoff_lodo.reason: Runnable with resolved methods, but still not fully aligned to the frozen DIG-seq plus DISCOVER-seq+ threshold set.

crispai_change_regression_uncertainty.reason: Processed CHANGE-seq table is not yet staged locally.

manifest_path_smoke.note: A one-epoch CPU smoke run completed through the new manifest-driven trainer path on cclmoff_lodo split 1.

beluga.reason: Remote sbatch failed immediately due an incompatible Slurm plugin stack on the host.

rorqual.details: Dry-run wrapper submissions were accepted by sbatch as jobs 7606933, 7606934, and 7606939, then cancelled. Real on-target jobs 7608231 and 7608234 are now queued.

fir.reason: sbatch not available in the current login environment.

cedar.reason: sbatch not available in the current login environment.

next_actions: Monitor rorqual jobs 7608231 and 7608234 and pull their result artifacts back once they start producing outputs.
Resolve or explicitly remap the unresolved blank Method bucket before counting any CCLMoff circle or transfer result as claim-valid.
Stage the processed CHANGE-seq table before attempting the crispAI-style regression and uncertainty frame.
Sync the off-target benchmark bundle to a SLURM-capable host before attempting non-dry-run off-target cluster jobs.
